title: Hilariously Optimised
description: My personal performance mods modpack, which I thoroughly test daily, and is kept as updated as possible.
body:
## Announcement
This modpack will remain on 1.20.1 for the time being, since it's the most supported and stable version for modpacks. There are barely, if any, performance improvements on later 1.20.x versions, so there's no reason to update to 1.20.4.

## TL;DR
Welcome to 'Hilariously Optimised' - your daily dose of gaming joy! Crafted with care, this modpack is a personal favorite that I use every day. It's constantly updated and rigorously bug-tested to ensure top-notch performance without compromising stability. Tried and tested on Hypixel for marathon 12-hour sessions with zero crashes, this pack is all about smooth, hassle-free gaming. Enjoy the ultimate performance experience, fine-tuned over months of dedicated tweaking and testing!

## x4.5 times the performance against vanilla: 158fps -> 680fps
Bench: amplified world, maxed settings, 32 chunks render, 300% entity distance, etc. 1:1 settings used when testing.

## Features:

>**Personal and Tested Use**: 
Hilariously Optimised is more than just a modpack; it's a daily driver for its creator, ensuring a personal touch and constant refinement. Regular use allows for immediate identification and rectification of any issues, guaranteeing a reliable and user-friendly experience.

>**Continual Updates for Peak Performance**: 
With an unwavering commitment to updates, Hilariously Optimised stays at the forefront of modpack performance. These consistent updates ensure that players always have access to the latest features and optimizations, leading to a smoother gaming experience.

>**Thorough and Rigorous Testing**: 
Each component of Hilariously Optimised undergoes extensive testing. This meticulous process is key to minimizing bugs and maximizing stability, providing a seamless experience that doesn't compromise on reliability.

>**Optimization with Stability in Mind**: 
The core philosophy of Hilariously Optimised revolves around enhancing performance while preserving the utmost stability. This balance is meticulously maintained to ensure that users enjoy both speed and a stable gaming environment.

>**Proven Track Record on Hypixel**: 
The modpack's reliability is exemplified by its flawless 12-hour run on the Hypixel server, with no crashes or kicks. This proves its compatibility and robustness in demanding multiplayer environments.

>**Zero-Hassle, High-Performance Assurance**: 
Months of dedicated updating and testing culminate in a zero-hassle experience for the user. The creator's commitment ensures that players enjoy the best possible performance without any unnecessary complications or interruptions.

>**Commitment to Long-Term Quality and Experience**: 
Hilariously Optimised isn't just about the present; it's a long-term commitment to quality. Ongoing updates and testing reflect a dedication to providing an ever-evolving, superior gaming experience that adapts to the user's needs over time.



<Details>
<summary>Disclaimer</summary>

Thank you for choosing Hilariously Optimized. As you embark on this gaming adventure, please consider the following professional yet friendly terms and conditions:

1. **Compatibility and Responsibility**: While we've diligently designed this modpack to align with the regulations of most public, third-party servers, it's essential that you, as a player, verify its acceptability on the servers you choose to join. Your decision to install and use "Hilariously Optimized" comes with the understanding that neither the modpack creators, the individual mod developers, nor Mojang offer any guarantees regarding its use. All actions you undertake with this modpack are solely your responsibility.

2. **Controller Support and Server Compliance**: Our modpack is compatible with controllers featuring analog inputs. However, be aware that this functionality might trigger anti-cheat mechanisms on certain servers due to the smoothness of movement it creates. Should you play on a server where analog input is restricted, you're encouraged to either add the server to the mod's whitelist or disable analog input to comply with server rules.

3. **Disabling Server Disclaimers**: Notably, this modpack deactivates the standard third-party server disclaimer. Engaging in multiplayer activities implies your acknowledgment and acceptance of the following: Online play occurs on third-party servers not affiliated with Mojang Studios or Microsoft. These environments may expose you to unmoderated content, including chat messages, which might not suit all audiences.

4. **Chat and Privacy Features**: Access the "social interactions" screen in-game by pressing 'P' or via the Player Reporting button in the pause menu. On servers where chat signing is optional, our modpack defaults to opting out, aligning with the server's preference. A distinctive icon will inform you about the chat signing status and server support for Mojang's chat safety features.

5. **Privacy and User Choice**: In line with our commitment to privacy and user clarity, "Hilariously Optimized" disables Mojang's analytics, individual mod update checkers, cosmetic donor features, and other network services that might infringe on privacy or create confusion. However, you have the freedom to reactivate these features in the respective configurations.

6. **Cosmetics Policy**: Our modpack neither hosts nor promotes the purchase of capes or other cosmetics. We encourage the use of free cosmetics, while also respecting your choice to use any paid items you may have acquired from certain providers.

7. **Licensing and Brand Usage**: You are welcome to fork or remix this pack in line with our licensing terms. However, the use of the "Fabulously Optimized" name or logo to represent your version is not permitted, though you may certainly credit it as your source of inspiration.

8. **Independent Product Declaration**: Hilariously Optimized is not an official Minecraft product and is neither endorsed nor affiliated with Mojang or Microsoft.

We wish you an enjoyable and immersive experience with Hilariously Optimized!

Credit: Disclaimer inspired from Fabulously-Optimized's disclaimer.

</details>
